The [[Tykannin Turbines]] '''3-2-XR''' was a [[Hoversled/Legends|repulsorlift sled]] armed with a light [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]]. It was often used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to patrol and travel between important facilities.

==Behind the scenes==
The 3-2-XR was detailed in ''[[Changing the Balance]]''. It is suggested that the Rebel team is discovered by a patrol or steals a vehicle for their own use after arriving at [[Draenell's Point]].<ref name="CTB" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Changing the Balance|book=Star Wars Gamemaster Kit|reprint=1}}
